overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a coastal boardwalk and through an abandoned amusement park area. The player moves from a sunny beachfront, through a dark underpass, along a waterfront promenade with a distinctive red roller coaster structure, and interacts with NPCs sitting on a bench.

events.description: approaching and entering the covered walkway under the building structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunny beachfront boardwalk toward a building underpass

entered.detail: tall palm tree with green fronds near the beachfront
sandy beach area leading to the ocean water
futuristic high-rise buildings visible across the water
low concrete barrier separating walkway from beach drop
large industrial dumpster with graffiti
large vertical advertisement poster on building wall showing a figure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny coastal boardwalk with palm trees and a view of a futuristic city skyline across the water. The camera moves forward along the concrete walkway, passing a poster billboard and trash container, approaching the entrance to a covered walkway beneath a large building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building structure

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into bright sunlight causing exposure adjustment

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete underpass beneath the building

entered.detail: dark concrete overhead structure blocking sky
large structural support columns for the building above
recessed lighting fixtures in the ceiling providing dim illumination
illuminated vending machine against the far wall
abandoned couch and debris piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark, enclosed concrete walkway beneath the building. Overhead lights provide minimal illumination as the camera passes discarded furniture and structural pillars, approaching the bright exit at the far end where sunlight streams in.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with abandoned amusement park structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit waterfront promenade with the red roller coaster structure becoming prominent on the right

entered.detail: tall red steel roller coaster tracks and supports of an abandoned amusement park ride
metal safety railing along the water's edge
modern curved street lamp posts along the promenade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass into bright sunlight, the scene opens to a waterfront promenade. The distinctive red steel structure of an abandoned roller coaster dominates the right side, while the camera continues forward along the concrete walkway with palm trees and modern streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway ascending to upper promenade level

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide concrete stairs to the upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to reach the upper level of the waterfront promenade

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
silver metal handrails along the stair sides
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the building

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and ascends a wide concrete stairway flanked by metal railings. As the climb progresses, the red roller coaster structure appears to recede into the distance, and a large digital billboard becomes visible on the building wall to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with amusement park ruins

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade level toward two individuals seated on a bench ahead

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a concrete bench, one appears to be playing a stringed instrument

entered.detail: open tiled pedestrian area on the upper level
long concrete seating bench with two people sitting on it
derelict small building structure with boarded windows
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the camera moves along an elevated paved plaza. The red roller coaster structure remains visible to the right, while ahead two individuals sit on a concrete bench. The area features abandoned structures and graffiti-covered walls, creating a post-apocalyptic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway bench area with NPC interaction

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the two seated individuals on the bench before continuing past them

notable_agents.action: two people in red athletic wear sitting on bench, one holding a guitar-like instrument, conversing casually

segments.scene_description: The camera stops to observe two NPCs sitting on the concrete bench - one playing a stringed instrument while the other listens. After a moment, the camera moves past them, revealing more of the graffiti-covered building walls and the upper promenade area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright coastal boardwalk through a dark underpass and into a weathered, elevated plaza. It begins on a sunny concrete walkway lined with palm trees and a distant futuristic skyline, moving forward past billboards toward the mouth of a covered passage. As the camera enters the dark, enclosed concrete walkway, the light dims significantly among structural pillars and discarded furniture before the scene opens again into blinding sunlight at the far exit. The camera then emerges onto a waterfront promenade dominated by a massive red steel roller coaster structure, ascending a wide concrete stairway that reveals a large digital billboard and pushes the coaster into the distance. Finally, the movement leads onto an elevated plaza filled with graffiti-covered walls and abandoned structures, where the camera pauses to observe two individuals on a bench, one playing a stringed instrument, before gliding past them into the desolate upper promenade.
